# Hard78 Abs85 MaxRecent4 Contract

## Hard 78
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.78 so long sessions stop earlier before attention rot

## Abs 85k
absolute trigger tokens default to 85000 so large-context models reclaim sooner

## MaxRecent 4
max recent size ratio defaults to 0.04 so recent windows stay denser after compaction
